comment.body:
If it goes in that direction tomorrow, and we have a quiet or at least positive geopolitical week, I think we could see a strong rally into OPEX and a great start to Q2. 

But this market is so crazy, a lot of news could come between tonight and Friday at close, I’m almost entirely in cash, with some very small 0-2DTE plays.
